name: How much money can I get for falling off ladder at work?
description: Medical, 2/3 wages, disability; third-party for pain—up to millions.

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for falling off ladder at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, 2/3 wages, disability; third-party for pain—up to millions.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Compensation covers medical bills, lost wages (2/3 of average), and disability**; third-party claims add pain/suffering.[1][6]

Settlements vary: $100K-$millions based on injury severity, like $8.75M for severe case.[1] Utah/Idaho caps non-economic damages.

- Calculate lost earning capacity.
- Factor future care costs.
- No cap on medical/lost wages in workers' comp.

Use records; attorney evaluates true value.
